meta.title: Air Force Jobs - Explosive Ordinance Disposal Mastercraftsman
meta.description:
An Explosive Ordinance Disposal technician or Mastercraftsman is part of a small team that is involved in the disposal of explosive hazards. There are 10 different streams varying from VIP protection to nuclear weapons to aerospace threats.
A strong brotherhood mentality as well as a strong logical sense and fearlessness are all traits needed to succeed in this branch of the Air Force.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
